objective: each agent's long-lived goal: raise GroundTruthAccuracy + grow stake (budget)
note: Bootcamp LEARNING loop: agents answer an easy yes/no curriculum of signed facts; WRONG answers are journaled (the agent learns the truth) so accuracy CLIMBS across rounds. We reward IMPROVEMENT (delta), not absolute accuracy — a lucky score is noise, a rising trajectory is skill. Reality-gated: every answer key is a signed fact. Recompute from [internal ledger] (per-agent accuracy history) + [internal ledger].
